name: Mocha Truffle Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Line the bottom and sides of a 10-inch cake pan with foil, allowing some foil to extend beyond the top of the pan. Smooth out the foil as much as possible. Generously coat with some butter.
Melt chocolate with remaining butter, coffee, and sugar over low heat until sugar dissolves. Simmer until mixture is smooth. Beat eggs until thick (about 5 minutes). Stir into melted chocolate mixture. Pour into prepared pan. Bake for approximately 50 minutes or until center is just set. Cool completely in the pan. Cover and refrigerate at least 8 hours or overnight.
Frosting: A few hours before serving, whip cream with powdered sugar and vanilla. Invert cake onto a serving platter. Remove foil carefully. Frost cake with whipped cream. Garnish with chocolate flakes.
To make Chocolate Flakes, melt semisweet chocolate and spread on a marble slab or large flat plate. Allow to harden. Scrape against the surface with a knife; it will flake into thin pieces.
